# Aussie, Kiwi, & Taswegian backgrounds

D20 investigator backgrounds for the Liminal Horror TTRPG.

Designed to represent regular and peculiar workers found in Australia, New Zealand, and Tasmania in the 2020s.

- __A/C Technician:__ h
- __Animation/VFX artist:__ C
- __Cellar hand:__ Bottle of wine, Corkscrew, Siphon tube and hand pump, Sulphur burning for barrel sanitisation and matches
- __Film extra:__ Facial prosthetics kit, 
- __Fruit picker:__ h (working holiday maker)
- __Golf Caddy:__ h
- __Jackaroo/Jillaroo:__ Insulated cooler jug, Motorbike helmet (1 armor), Pocket knife (d6), Riding boots
- __Lifeguard:__ K
- __Martial arts trainer:__ 
- __Miner:__ B
- __Pearl Farm Diver:__ 
- __Pilot:__ L
- __Roadkill collector:__ 
- __Sand artist:__
- __Supermarket employee:__ h
- __Surfer:__
- __Tour guide:__ T
- __Tradie:__ S
- __Venom milker:__ h
- __Zookeeper:__ f
